wine_restaurants.name: Padi
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern regional Hungarian cuisine; Sauska Tokaj wine-focused tasting menus
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin Opening of the Year 2025, inside the Sauska Tokaj winery. Chef Máté Gerák's kitchen draws on local produce and Tokaj terroir; two tasting menus, one themed around Tokaj itself. Open-kitchen format with panoramic terrace over the vines.

wine_restaurants.name: Anyukám Mondta
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Hungarian with Italian and Mediterranean influences; strong Tokaj and Hungarian wine list
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin Bib Gourmand restaurant in Encs on the western edge of the Tokaj region. Homemade pizzas and refined modern Italian-Hungarian dishes; wine list begins with a cuvée made by Szepsy the Younger for the restaurant, expanded to Hungarian and international selections.

wine_restaurants.name: Talu Restaurant
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Regional Hungarian gourmet cuisine; Tokaj-Hegyalja wine program
wine_restaurants.description: Gault and Millau two-chef-hat restaurant at Andrássy Kúria five-star hotel in Tarcal. Chef brings regional flavours using local ingredients; wine selection focuses on Tokaj-Hegyalja producers, complemented by Hungarian selections.

wine_restaurants.name: Sárga Borház
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Hungarian seasonal cuisine with wine and appetizer pairing menus
wine_restaurants.description: Casual restaurant at the Disznókő estate alongside Route 37, built in a mid-19th-century classical style. Features seasonal table recommendations refreshed continuously; wine-and-appetizer menus pairing dishes with Disznókő and leading Tokaj wines.

wine_restaurants.name: Percze Étterem
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Hungarian cuisine with Szepsy wine pairings; vineyard views
wine_restaurants.description: Restaurant and wine experience centre in Mád with panoramic vineyard views through floor-to-ceiling windows. Partnered with Szepsy winery; comprehensive Szepsy wine list with modern Hungarian dishes from fresh local produce.

wine_restaurants.name: Gróf Degenfeld Étterem
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Hungarian regional cuisine paired with estate Furmint, Hárslevelű, and Aszú wines
wine_restaurants.description: Restaurant at the Gróf Degenfeld Castle Hotel, set in a vineyard manor in Tarcal. Chef-led pairings with estate wines; cellar visits integrate with dining; 35 ha of estate vines visible from dining room.

wine_restaurants.name: Winestone Étterem at Mercure Tokaj Center
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Hungarian and international cuisine; 120-wine Tokaj-focused cellar
wine_restaurants.description: In-hotel restaurant at the Mercure Tokaj Center on the main street in Tokaj. Cellar-style interior with 120 local wines; Hungarian classics and international dishes; summer riverfront terrace on the Bodrog.

wine_restaurants.name: Tortuga Restaurant at Minaro Hotel Tokaj
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern European and Hungarian gourmet cuisine; Tokaj wine program with regional producers
wine_restaurants.description: Signature restaurant at the five-star Minaro MGallery Hotel with panoramic views of the UNESCO-listed wine region. Gastronomy masterclasses and cooking demonstrations offered alongside wine programmes featuring Béres, Oremus, among others.

wine_restaurants.name: Füleky Pincészet Guesthouse Restaurant
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Hungarian regional cuisine with estate Tokaj wine pairings; cellar dinners
wine_restaurants.description: Guesthouse restaurant at Füleky winery's 18th-century Baroque mansion in Bodrogkeresztúr. Dinner menus, cellar visits and wine events; six ensuite double bedrooms for overnight guests. Estate owns 25 ha in top Tokaj vineyards.

wine_restaurants.name: LaBor Bistro
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern bistro with local ingredients and Tokaj-Hegyalja wine pairings
wine_restaurants.description: Modern bistro in central Tokaj focusing on local seasonal ingredients paired with Tokaj-Hegyalja wines. Relaxed contemporary format with a well-curated regional wine list.

wine_restaurants.name: Barta Pince Restaurant
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Hungarian regional cuisine with Barta estate wine programme
wine_restaurants.description: Restaurant associated with Barta Winery and the Rákóczi-Aspremont Mansion in Mád. Estate wines including organic Furmint cuvées are paired with traditional Zemplén dishes; accommodation in the historic 17th-century mansion.
